records.ety: [L. inexcusabilis: cf. F. inexcusable. See Excuse.]

defs: Not excusable; not admitting excuse or justification; as, inexcusable folly.
quotes: Therefore thou art inexcusable, O man, whosoever thou art that judgest; for wherein thou judgest another, thou condemnest thyself; for thou that judgest doest the same things.
